author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Make toolbar brand link to /home
body:
Wrap the rocket icon and Vibular wordmark in an anchor with routerLink
and a subtle hover/focus background so it reads as a clickable home
link, matching the behavior users expect from a site header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Add spacing between buttons in Remix CTA card
body:
Material's default mat-card-actions layout puts buttons flush; add a
0.75rem gap and allow wrapping so the two actions breathe on narrow
viewports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Phase 2: dark mode, shortcuts, command palette, vibe CTAs
body:
- Dark mode cycle (system / light / dark) wired to html.mode-* classes;
  body now declares `color-scheme: light dark` so Material 3 tokens
  adapt to system preference by default, with explicit overrides
  persisted to localStorage.
- ShortcutsService: single keydown listener with chord support. g h/c/
  p/a navigates, t cycles theme, m cycles mode, ? opens the cheatsheet,
  / or Ctrl/Cmd+K opens the palette. Typing-in-input is ignored.
- Cheatsheet dialog — grouped shortcut rows with <kbd> chips.
- Command palette (Cmd+K) — fuzzy match over 4 pages + 26 demos, arrow
  navigation + enter, routes to anchor on select.
- Home: "Prompt this site" and "Remix it" cards with one-click copy
  of seed and remix prompts (paste straight into Claude Code).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Phase 1 polish: 404, deep links, OG card, transitions, install prompt
body:
- Custom 404 page with a floating rocket and two CTAs, wired via
  loadComponent on the wildcard route.
- Per-demo anchors: slugified id + click-to-copy link icon on each
  title, plus router anchor/scroll restoration so deep links land
  cleanly below the sticky toolbar.
- Open Graph + Twitter meta and a 1200x630 social card generated via
  a new scripts/generate-og.mjs (re-using the rocket SVG).
- View Transitions API via withViewTransitions + a subtle fade-slide
  keyframe pair, guarded by prefers-reduced-motion.
- PWA install banner that listens for beforeinstallprompt, dismisses
  to localStorage, and self-hides on appinstalled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Make header and pages responsive
body:
Add a hamburger menu below 720px so the toolbar nav collapses cleanly
on mobile, clip body-level horizontal overflow globally, and wrap the
Material table demo in a scrollable container so it pans horizontally
instead of pushing the page. Also extend the prompts timeline with
entries 25-30 covering the README rewrite, GitHub Pages setup, and
build fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Fix GitHub Pages build
body:
Add @angular/animations dependency — async-animations provider
lazy-imports it and the production bundler can't resolve it otherwise.
Also opt the workflow into Node 24 for JS actions and bump the runtime
Node to 22 to clear the deprecation warning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Add GitHub Pages deploy workflow
body:
Build with --base-href /vibular/, copy index.html to 404.html for SPA
fallback on deep links, and publish dist/angular-bootstrap/browser via
actions/deploy-pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Rewrite README as a Vibular intro
body:
Replace the default Angular CLI README with a witty project-specific
one covering the theming, PWA, prompts page, and vibe-coding origin story.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Nagaraj Hubli
subject: Initial commit: Vibular — an Angular 21 + Material 3 vibe-coded starter
body:
- Angular 21 standalone components with signals and lazy-loaded routes
- Material Design 3 theming with 3 pastel themes (Azure, Rose, Mint)
- Home, About, Components gallery, and Prompts timeline pages
- Syntax-highlighted copy-ready snippets for every Material component
- Lato body + Montserrat heading typography
- PWA-ready with rocket-launch icons, manifest, and service worker
- OnPush change detection across all components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
